diabetes.cn: 海南鸡饭的白米饭GI值高，容易导致血糖快速升高。建议：1) 选择糙米饭版本 2) 只吃半份饭 3) 多吃配菜蔬菜 4) 去掉鸡皮减少脂肪摄入
diabetes.en: Chicken rice has high GI white rice that can spike blood sugar. Tips: 1) Choose brown rice 2) Take half portion of rice 3) Add vegetables 4) Remove chicken skin

hypertension.cn: 鸡饭的酱料和鸡汤饭含钠量较高。建议：1) 少放酱油和辣椒酱 2) 不要额外加酱料 3) 选择白斩鸡而非烧鸡（烧鸡含钠更高）
hypertension.en: The sauces and chicken broth rice are high in sodium. Tips: 1) Less soy sauce and chili 2) Skip extra sauces 3) Choose steamed over roast chicken

hyperlipidemia.cn: 鸡皮和油饭含较多饱和脂肪。建议：1) 去掉鸡皮 2) 选择鸡胸肉而非鸡腿 3) 减少油饭份量
hyperlipidemia.en: Chicken skin and oily rice are high in saturated fat. Tips: 1) Remove skin 2) Choose breast over thigh 3) Less rice

healthier_alternatives.name_cn: 半份饭 + 加一份蔬菜

diabetes.cn: 椰浆饭热量和GI值都高。椰浆含大量饱和脂肪。建议：1) 减少饭量 2) 选择烤鸡翅而非炸鸡翅 3) 多吃花生和江鱼仔中的蛋白质 4) 加一份蔬菜
diabetes.en: Nasi Lemak is calorie-dense with high GI. Tips: 1) Reduce rice portion 2) Choose grilled over fried chicken 3) Eat peanuts and ikan bilis for protein 4) Add vegetables

hypertension.cn: 参巴辣椒酱含高钠，炸江鱼仔也偏咸。建议：1) 少放参巴酱 2) 控制江鱼仔摄入 3) 选择较清淡的配菜
hypertension.en: Sambal is high in sodium, ikan bilis are salty. Tips: 1) Less sambal 2) Limit ikan bilis 3) Choose lighter side dishes

hyperlipidemia.cn: 椰浆富含饱和脂肪（月桂酸），炸鸡翅额外增加脂肪。建议：1) 减少椰浆饭份量 2) 不要炸鸡翅，选择煎蛋或烤鱼 3) 限制频率（每周不超过1-2次）
hyperlipidemia.en: Coconut milk is high in saturated fat. Tips: 1) Reduce portion 2) Skip fried chicken, choose egg or grilled fish 3) Limit to 1-2 times per week

diabetes.cn: 炒粿条碳水化合物含量高，且加了甜酱油增加糖分。建议：1) 选择小份 2) 要求少油少甜酱油 3) 偶尔食用
diabetes.en: High in carbs with sweet dark soy sauce. Tips: 1) Small portion 2) Request less oil and sweet sauce 3) Eat occasionally

hypertension.cn: 炒粿条含钠量非常高（酱油+鱼露+调味料）。建议：1) 少吃（每周不超过1次）2) 要求少放酱油 3) 搭配新鲜蔬菜
hypertension.en: Very high sodium from soy sauce and fish sauce. Tips: 1) Limit to once a week 2) Request less sauce 3) Pair with fresh vegetables

hyperlipidemia.cn: 用大量猪油/食用油炒制，含血蛤（高胆固醇）。建议：1) 要求少油 2) 不要血蛤 3) 选择小份
hyperlipidemia.en: Cooked with lots of lard/oil, contains cockles (high cholesterol). Tips: 1) Request less oil 2) Skip cockles 3) Small portion

healthier_alternatives.name_en: Light-fried kway teow (less oil, less sauce)

diabetes.cn: 叻沙的米粉碳水较高，但GI值中等。椰浆汤底热量高。建议：1) 不要喝完所有汤 2) 选择米粉而非黄面（混合更好）3) 加豆腐泡增加蛋白质
diabetes.en: Rice noodles are moderate GI. Coconut broth is calorie-dense. Tips: 1) Don't finish the soup 2) Choose vermicelli 3) Add tofu puffs for protein

hypertension.cn: 叻沙汤底含钠量极高（虾膏+盐+椰浆）。建议：1) 不要喝汤！2) 偶尔食用 3) 选择干捞版本（如果有）
hypertension.en: Laksa broth is extremely high in sodium. Tips: 1) DON'T drink the soup! 2) Eat occasionally 3) Choose dry version if available

hyperlipidemia.cn: 椰浆含大量饱和脂肪。建议：1) 不喝汤 2) 限制频率 3) 选择Assam Laksa（酸辣叻沙，不含椰浆）代替
hyperlipidemia.en: Coconut milk is very high in saturated fat. Tips: 1) Skip the soup 2) Limit frequency 3) Choose Assam Laksa (no coconut milk) instead

healthier_alternatives.name_cn: 叻沙不喝汤 + 加蔬菜

diabetes.cn: Roti Prata是精制面粉制品，GI值高，容易升血糖。建议：1) 限制在1片 2) 搭配含蛋白质的咖喱（如鱼咖喱、鸡咖喱）3) 选择Thosai作为替代
diabetes.en: Roti Prata is refined flour with high GI. Tips: 1) Limit to 1 piece 2) Pair with protein-rich curry 3) Choose Thosai as alternative

hypertension.cn: 煎饼本身钠含量中等，但咖喱酱可能偏咸。建议：1) 少蘸咖喱 2) 选择蔬菜咖喱而非肉咖喱
hypertension.en: Moderate sodium, but curry can be salty. Tips: 1) Less curry dipping 2) Choose vegetable curry over meat curry

hyperlipidemia.cn: 制作过程使用大量黄油/ghee，饱和脂肪高。建议：1) 限制频率 2) 选择Thosai（无需黄油）3) 不要加芝士或鸡蛋版本
hyperlipidemia.en: Made with lots of ghee/butter, high saturated fat. Tips: 1) Limit frequency 2) Choose Thosai (no ghee needed) 3) Avoid cheese or egg versions

diabetes.cn: Thosai由发酵米糊和扁豆制成，GI值中等，比Roti Prata好。建议：1) 可以适量食用 2) 搭配Sambar（扁豆汤）增加蛋白质和纤维 3) 避免加过多椰子酱
diabetes.en: Fermented rice and lentil crepe with moderate GI. Tips: 1) OK in moderation 2) Pair with Sambar for protein/fiber 3) Go easy on coconut chutney

hypertension.cn: 钠含量适中。建议正常食用，注意酱料的盐分。
hypertension.en: Moderate sodium. Eat normally, watch the salt in accompaniments.

hyperlipidemia.cn: 低脂肪选择！比Roti Prata健康很多。建议：1) 选择plain Thosai 2) 少加黄油/ghee 3) 搭配Sambar
hyperlipidemia.en: Low fat option! Much healthier than Roti Prata. Tips: 1) Choose plain 2) Skip butter/ghee 3) Pair with Sambar

diabetes.cn: Biryani饭量大且使用Basmati米（GI比白米低但仍需控量）。建议：1) 只吃半份饭 2) 多吃鸡肉和蔬菜 3) Basmati米比普通白米GI稍低，可接受
diabetes.en: Large rice portion but Basmati has lower GI than white rice. Tips: 1) Eat half the rice 2) Focus on chicken and vegetables 3) Basmati rice is a better choice

hypertension.cn: 香料较多但钠含量中等偏高。建议：1) 少加额外的腌菜/酱料 2) 选择鸡肉而非羊肉版本
hypertension.en: Moderately high sodium. Tips: 1) Skip extra pickles/sauces 2) Choose chicken over mutton

hyperlipidemia.cn: 含一定量的ghee和油，但比Nasi Lemak好。建议：1) 去掉鸡皮 2) 减少饭量 3) 选择鸡胸而非鸡腿
hyperlipidemia.en: Contains ghee but better than Nasi Lemak. Tips: 1) Remove chicken skin 2) Reduce rice 3) Choose breast over thigh

healthier_alternatives.benefit: 减少碳水，酸奶增加益生菌

diabetes.cn: 卤面的甜辣酱汁含糖较多，面条也是碳水来源。建议：1) 不喝完所有酱汁 2) 要求少甜酱 3) 多吃配料中的鸡蛋和豆腐
diabetes.en: The sweet gravy contains sugar and noodles are carb-heavy. Tips: 1) Don't finish all the gravy 2) Request less sweet sauce 3) Eat the egg and tofu

hypertension.cn: 酱汁含钠高。建议：1) 少喝酱汁 2) 不加额外酱油
hypertension.en: Gravy is high in sodium. Tips: 1) Less gravy 2) No extra soy sauce

hyperlipidemia.cn: 比炒粿条脂肪含量低。酱汁用红薯和虾米制成。建议：适量食用，控制酱汁摄入。
hyperlipidemia.en: Lower fat than Char Kway Teow. Tips: Eat in moderation, control gravy intake.

serving_size: 1 bowl with rice and you tiao

diabetes.cn: 肉骨茶配白饭和油条碳水偏高。建议：1) 少吃饭和油条 2) 多吃排骨肉（蛋白质好）3) 可加蔬菜 4) 胡椒汤底（潮州式）比药材汤底稍好
diabetes.en: Rice and you tiao add carbs. Tips: 1) Less rice and you tiao 2) Focus on the pork ribs (good protein) 3) Add vegetables 4) Pepper broth slightly better than herbal

hypertension.cn: 肉骨茶汤底含钠量高。建议：1) 不要喝太多汤 2) 不要加额外酱油蘸排骨 3) 少吃油条（吸收了高钠汤汁）
hypertension.en: Broth is high in sodium. Tips: 1) Don't drink too much soup 2) Skip soy sauce dip 3) Less you tiao (absorbs salty broth)

hyperlipidemia.cn: 排骨含一定脂肪，油条是油炸食品。建议：1) 选择瘦排骨 2) 少吃或不吃油条 3) 汤底的脂肪含量取决于烹饪方式
hyperlipidemia.en: Pork ribs have some fat, you tiao is deep-fried. Tips: 1) Choose lean ribs 2) Skip you tiao 3) Skim fat from broth

healthier_alternatives.name_cn: 肉骨茶不加油条配糙米饭
healthier_alternatives.name_en: BKT without you tiao + brown rice
Less soup, more meat and vegetables

diabetes.cn: 板面的面条是手工面，GI中等。汤版本比干捞好。建议：1) 选择汤面版本 2) 加多蔬菜（通常有菜心）3) 面条份量适中
diabetes.en: Handmade noodles have moderate GI. Soup version is better. Tips: 1) Choose soup version 2) Add vegetables 3) Moderate noodle portion

hypertension.cn: 汤底可能偏咸。建议：1) 不喝完所有汤 2) 不加额外调味料
hypertension.en: Broth can be salty. Tips: 1) Don't finish all the soup 2) No extra seasoning

hyperlipidemia.cn: 相对较健康的选择，脂肪含量中等。建议：1) 选择汤面而非干捞（干捞加了更多油和酱）2) 不加炸鱼片/炸猪肉
hyperlipidemia.en: Relatively healthy choice. Tips: 1) Choose soup over dry (dry has more oil/sauce) 2) Skip fried toppings

healthier_alternatives.name_en: Soup ban mian with extra vegetables

diabetes.cn: 经济饭的好处是可以自己选菜！建议：1) 要求少饭或糙米饭 2) 选择蒸/炒蔬菜而非油炸菜 3) 选择蒸鱼/鸡胸而非炸鸡/咕噜肉 4) 多选绿叶蔬菜
diabetes.en: Economy rice lets you customize! Tips: 1) Request less rice or brown rice 2) Choose steamed/stir-fried veg over deep-fried 3) Pick steamed fish/chicken breast over fried 4) More green leafy vegetables

hypertension.cn: 取决于选择什么菜。建议：1) 选择少酱汁的菜 2) 避免腌制品（咸蛋、咸菜）3) 选择清蒸类菜肴
hypertension.en: Depends on choices. Tips: 1) Less sauce 2) Avoid preserved items (salted egg, pickled veg) 3) Choose steamed dishes

hyperlipidemia.cn: 可以通过选择控制脂肪摄入。建议：1) 避免油炸菜（如炸鸡翅、炸豆腐）2) 选择蒸鱼、白切鸡 3) 多蔬菜少肉
hyperlipidemia.en: Fat content depends on choices. Tips: 1) Avoid fried items 2) Choose steamed fish, white chicken 3) More veg, less meat

healthier_alternatives.name_cn: 少饭 + 2份蔬菜 + 1份清蒸肉类

diabetes.cn: 咖喱鱼头含好的蛋白质和Omega-3。建议：1) 少吃饭，多吃鱼肉和蔬菜（秋葵、茄子）2) 不要用面包蘸太多咖喱汁 3) 鱼肉是很好的蛋白质来源
diabetes.en: Good protein and Omega-3. Tips: 1) Less rice, more fish and vegetables 2) Don't soak too much bread in curry 3) Fish is excellent protein

hypertension.cn: 咖喱酱含钠较高。建议：1) 少吃咖喱汁 2) 多吃鱼肉和蔬菜 3) 不加额外盐
hypertension.en: Curry sauce is high in sodium. Tips: 1) Less curry sauce 2) More fish and vegetables 3) No extra salt

hyperlipidemia.cn: 咖喱通常含椰浆（饱和脂肪高），但鱼肉含好的Omega-3脂肪酸。建议：1) 少吃咖喱汁 2) 多吃鱼肉 3) 选择不含椰浆的版本（如果有）
hyperlipidemia.en: Curry has coconut milk (high sat fat) but fish has Omega-3. Tips: 1) Less curry sauce 2) More fish 3) Choose non-coconut version if available

healthier_alternatives.name_en: Steamed fish with small side of curry

serving_size: 10 sticks with peanut sauce, ketupat, cucumber

diabetes.cn: 沙爹酱含糖分（花生+甜酱），Ketupat（粽子米糕）是碳水来源。建议：1) 少蘸花生酱 2) 少吃Ketupat 3) 多吃黄瓜 4) 选择鸡肉沙爹（比羊肉脂肪少）
diabetes.en: Peanut sauce has sugar, ketupat adds carbs. Tips: 1) Less peanut sauce 2) Less ketupat 3) More cucumber 4) Choose chicken over mutton

hypertension.cn: 钠含量中等。建议正常食用，注意花生酱的用量。
hypertension.en: Moderate sodium. Eat normally, watch peanut sauce portions.

hyperlipidemia.cn: 花生酱含脂肪较高，但花生中的不饱和脂肪酸对心血管有益。建议：1) 适量蘸花生酱 2) 选择鸡胸沙爹 3) 烧烤比油炸好
hyperlipidemia.en: Peanut sauce has fat but peanuts have healthy unsaturated fats. Tips: 1) Moderate peanut sauce 2) Choose chicken breast satay 3) Grilling is better than frying

healthier_alternatives.name_cn: 鸡肉沙爹少酱 + 黄瓜
healthier_alternatives.name_en: Chicken satay with less sauce + cucumber

diabetes.cn: 拉茶含大量炼奶和糖，会导致血糖快速上升！建议：1) 点Teh O Kosong（红茶不加糖不加奶）2) 或Teh C Siu Dai（淡奶少糖）3) 避免每天喝
diabetes.en: Teh Tarik has lots of condensed milk and sugar! Tips: 1) Order Teh O Kosong (black tea, no sugar, no milk) 2) Or Teh C Siu Dai (evaporated milk, less sugar) 3) Don't drink daily

hypertension.cn: 钠含量低，但高糖饮食长期可影响血压。建议选择少糖版本。
hypertension.en: Low sodium, but long-term high sugar affects BP. Choose less sugar versions.

hyperlipidemia.cn: 炼奶含饱和脂肪。建议：1) 选择Teh O（不加奶）2) 或用低脂奶
hyperlipidemia.en: Condensed milk has saturated fat. Tips: 1) Choose Teh O (no milk) 2) Or use low-fat milk

healthier_alternatives.name_cn: Teh O Kosong（红茶无糖无奶）
healthier_alternatives.name_en: Teh O Kosong (black tea, no sugar, no milk)

healthier_alternatives.name_cn: Teh C Siu Dai（淡奶少糖）
healthier_alternatives.name_en: Teh C Siu Dai (evaporated milk, less sugar)

diabetes.cn: 南洋咖啡加了炼奶和糖，糖分极高。建议：1) 点Kopi O Kosong（黑咖啡无糖）2) 或Kopi C Siu Dai（淡奶少糖）3) 最好的选择是Kopi O Kosong
diabetes.en: Kopi has condensed milk and sugar. Tips: 1) Order Kopi O Kosong (black, no sugar) 2) Or Kopi C Siu Dai (evaporated milk, less sugar) 3) Best choice: Kopi O Kosong

hypertension.cn: 咖啡因可能短暂升高血压。建议：1) 每天不超过2杯 2) 选择少糖版本
hypertension.en: Caffeine may temporarily raise BP. Tips: 1) Max 2 cups daily 2) Choose less sugar version

hyperlipidemia.cn: 炼奶含饱和脂肪。建议选择Kopi O（不加奶）或Kopi C（淡奶）。
hyperlipidemia.en: Condensed milk has saturated fat. Choose Kopi O (no milk) or Kopi C (evaporated milk).

healthier_alternatives.name_cn: Kopi C Siu Dai（淡奶少糖）
healthier_alternatives.name_en: Kopi C Siu Dai (evaporated milk, less sugar)

diabetes.cn: ⚠️ 甘蔗水含糖量极高，会导致血糖急剧飙升！一杯含糖约43克（相当于10颗方糖）。强烈建议：1) 避免饮用 2) 如果很想喝，最多喝几口 3) 选择无糖饮品代替
diabetes.en: ⚠️ Extremely high sugar (43g per cup = 10 sugar cubes)! Will cause blood sugar spike. Strongly recommend: 1) Avoid 2) If craving, take just a few sips 3) Choose sugar-free drinks

hypertension.cn: 钠含量低，但高糖摄入长期不利于血压控制。建议少喝。
hypertension.en: Low sodium, but chronic high sugar intake affects BP. Drink less.

hyperlipidemia.cn: 高糖可导致甘油三酯升高。建议避免或极少量饮用。
hyperlipidemia.en: High sugar can raise triglycerides. Avoid or drink very small amounts.

diabetes.cn: ⚠️ 红豆冰含大量糖浆、炼奶、红豆（含糖煮过），糖分极高。强烈建议避免。如果必须吃：1) 要求不加糖浆和炼奶 2) 只吃少量 3) 不要当正餐后的甜品
diabetes.en: ⚠️ Extremely high sugar from syrup, condensed milk, and sweetened beans. Strongly avoid. If must eat: 1) No syrup/condensed milk 2) Small portion only 3) Don't have after a meal

hypertension.cn: 高糖长期不利于代谢健康。建议少吃。
hypertension.en: Chronic high sugar is bad for metabolic health. Eat less.

hyperlipidemia.cn: 高糖可升高甘油三酯。建议少吃或避免。
hyperlipidemia.en: High sugar raises triglycerides. Eat less or avoid.

healthier_alternatives.benefit: 天然甜味，含纤维和维生素

diabetes.cn: 酿豆腐是非常好的选择！可以自己控制食材。建议：1) 多选蔬菜（苦瓜、豆角、生菜、蘑菇）2) 选豆腐（好蛋白质）3) 少选炸的食品（如炸腐皮）4) 选择汤版本，少用甜酱
diabetes.en: YTF is a great choice! You control ingredients. Tips: 1) More vegetables (bitter gourd, beans, lettuce, mushrooms) 2) Choose tofu (good protein) 3) Less fried items 4) Soup version, less sweet sauce

hypertension.cn: 汤底和甜酱可能含钠较高。建议：1) 选择清汤 2) 少放甜酱和辣酱 3) 多选新鲜蔬菜
hypertension.en: Soup and sauces may have sodium. Tips: 1) Choose clear soup 2) Less sweet/chili sauce 3) More fresh vegetables

hyperlipidemia.cn: 可以通过选择低脂食材来控制。建议：1) 避免炸腐皮和炸鱼丸 2) 多选蔬菜和豆腐 3) 选择汤版而非干捞（干版加更多油和酱）
hyperlipidemia.en: Control fat by choosing wisely. Tips: 1) Avoid fried items 2) More vegetables and tofu 3) Soup over dry version

healthier_alternatives.name_cn: 全蔬菜选择 + 豆腐 + 清汤
healthier_alternatives.benefit: 最健康的小贩中心选择之一

diabetes.cn: 鸡蛋面GI中等。干版的酱汁含糖。建议：1) 选择汤面版本（少酱汁）2) 控制面条份量 3) 多吃配菜蔬菜
diabetes.en: Egg noodles have moderate GI. Dry version sauce has sugar. Tips: 1) Choose soup version 2) Control noodle portion 3) Eat the vegetables

hypertension.cn: 酱油和辣椒酱含钠高。建议：1) 少放酱 2) 选择汤面 3) 不加额外调味料
hypertension.en: Soy sauce and chili sauce are high in sodium. Tips: 1) Less sauce 2) Choose soup version 3) No extra seasoning

hyperlipidemia.cn: 猪油是传统配料，增加饱和脂肪。建议：1) 要求少油/不加猪油 2) 叉烧选择瘦肉版
hyperlipidemia.en: Lard is traditional, adds saturated fat. Tips: 1) Request less oil/no lard 2) Choose lean char siu

healthier_alternatives.name_en: Soup wanton mee (less sauce, less oil)

diabetes.cn: 米粉碳水含量中等，酱汁含糖。建议：1) 不喝完酱汁 2) 多吃配料中的鸡蛋和豆芽 3) 控制分量
diabetes.en: Rice noodles have moderate carbs, sauce has sugar. Tips: 1) Don't finish the gravy 2) Eat the egg and bean sprouts 3) Moderate portion

hypertension.cn: 酱汁含钠较高。建议少喝酱汁。
hypertension.en: Gravy is high in sodium. Eat less gravy.

hyperlipidemia.cn: 脂肪含量适中。比炒粿条和叻沙健康。正常食用即可。
hyperlipidemia.en: Moderate fat. Healthier than Char Kway Teow and Laksa. OK to eat normally.

healthier_alternatives.name_cn: 少酱汁版本 + 加蔬菜
